name: Island
visual_description: Flooded underground cavern with still, reflective water mirroring ancient stone arches and crumbling columns. Luminescent moss clings to weathered rocks. Water drips from stalactites above, rippling the surface. Dim blue-green light filters through cracks in the cavern ceiling, illuminating submerged ruins and the echoing void beyond.
full_prompt: Flooded underground cavern with still, reflective water mirroring ancient stone arches and crumbling columns. Luminescent moss clings to weathered rocks. Water drips from stalactites above, rippling the surface. Dim blue-green light filters through cracks in the cavern ceiling, illuminating submerged ruins and the echoing void beyond.. Stylized digital illustration, panoramic landscape, dramatic atmospheric perspective, concept-art establishing shot, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
